title: feat: WhatsApp Business API integration layer
description:
Add a WhatsApp integration layer so the KayaBot can respond directly in the group chat. Implement a `src/integrations/whatsapp.py` module that bridges the existing `src/chat/chat.py` logic to the WhatsApp Business Cloud API (Meta). Requirements:
- Receive incoming messages via webhook (Flask/FastAPI endpoint)
- Route messages through the RAG+model pipeline
- Send responses back via WhatsApp API
- Support group chat (single bot responding to the group)
- Add `integrations.whatsapp` config section in config.yaml
- All conversation data stays local (no cloud DB)
- Add tests in tests/integrations/

Relevant files: `src/chat/chat.py`, `src/chat/retriever.py`, `config.yaml`

title: feat: incremental knowledge base auto-refresh
description:
Add an incremental knowledge extraction mode that processes only new messages since the last pipeline run, rather than requiring a full pipeline execution. Requirements:
- Track last-processed message timestamp in `data/kb_checkpoint.json`
- In `src/data/knowledge_base.py`, add `run_incremental_update()` that only processes messages newer than the checkpoint
- After extraction, upsert new facts into ChromaDB `kaya_knowledge_base` collection without rebuilding from scratch
- Update `src/data/build_vector_db.py` to support `--incremental` flag
- Add config option `knowledge_base.incremental: true` to config.yaml
- Add tests in tests/pipeline/test_incremental_kb.py

Relevant files: `src/data/knowledge_base.py`, `src/data/build_vector_db.py`, `config.yaml`
